REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS NAVIGATORS INSURANCE COMPANY AND NAVIGATORS SPECIALITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. ON A DEMURRER, THE COURT WILL ONLY LOOK AT THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT AND THE FACTS ALLEGED ARE DEEMED TO BE TRUE. PLAINTIFF, THEREFORE, SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES HE IS AN ASSIGNEE OF SCOTT PETERS AND THE COMPLAINT STATES FACTS SUFFICIENT TO CONSTITUTE THE ALLEGED CAUSES OF ACTION. THE COURT DECLINES TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE REQUESTED DOCUMENTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Prayers For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Demian I. Oksenendler, Esq. of Mannion & Lowe, Tel. 415.733.1054, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ALFREDO JACOBO's Motion To Strike Prayers For Attorneys Fees is Granted, without leave to amend. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Continued To Dec-12-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2012 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alison F. Greene, Esq. of Burnham Brown, Tel. 510.835.6724, for Defendant and moving party;
Demian I. Oksenendler, Esq. of Mannion & Lowe, Tel. 415.733.1054, for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS NAVIGATORS INSURANCE COMPANY and NAVIGATORS SPECIALITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. On a demurrer, the Court will only look at the face of the complaint and the facts alleged are deemed to be true. Plaintiff, therefore, sufficiently alleges he is an assignee of Scott Peters and the Complaint states facts sufficient to constitute the alleged causes of action. The Court declines to take judicial notice of the requested documents. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
